svg.title: SmartStudy logo — faithful Aksumite stele proportions
svg.desc: Logo mark derived from the Obelisk of Aksum with correct slender proportions, beam projections, half-moon cap, and multi-floor false window grid. Red and gold palette.
svg.text: Primary mark — faithful to the obelisk of Aksum
Tapered body, half-moon cap, 5 floors of false windows with beam projections, base plate, false door — all from the real obelisk
Center spine line doubles as the book-page metaphor; tibeb strip: red–gold–red
